faqs.question: What pantry pests are most common in Freeport homes?
faqs.answer: Freeport homes most commonly experience Indian meal moths, grain beetles, flour weevils, and cigarette beetles. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, nuts, dried fruits, and pet food. Our $350-$550 treatment targets all life stages of these pests to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: What does your pantry pest control treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of all food storage areas, identification of infested products, targeted treatment of affected zones, crack and crevice applications, and detailed prevention recommendations. We also provide guidance on proper food storage and sanitation practices to prevent re-infestation, all included in our $350-$550 pricing.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products specifically designed for food preparation areas that are safe when applied correctly. Our technicians follow strict protocols to protect your family, pets, and food supplies during treatment.
